mission.title: litellm: [Bug]: LiteLLM proxy for Codex CLI does not work with the new gpt-5-codex model
mission.description: [Bug]: LiteLLM proxy for Codex CLI does not work with the new gpt-5-codex model. This issue affects 16+ users.

steps.title: Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review litellm configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm
```
## System Information

- codex-cli 0.40.0
- Darwin 24.6.0 arm64 arm

Config file present in `~/.codex/config.toml`

```bash
model = "gpt-5-codex"
model_provider = "litellm"
model_reasoning_effort = "medium"

# Model Providers
#

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Bug]: LiteLLM proxy for Codex CLI does not work with the…
steps.description:
We are also seeing an issue when trying to use the Codex CLI with `gpt-5-codex` through LiteLLM proxy, but a different error:
```
⚠️ stream error: unexpected status 400 Bad Request: {"error":{"message":"litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - {\n  \"error\":
{\n    \"message\": \"Missing
```yaml
model = "gpt-5-codex"
model_provider = "litellm"
model_reasoning_effort = "medium"

# Model Providers
# ===============

[model_providers.litellm]
name = "LiteLLM"
base_url = "LITELLM_URL(redacted)"
env_key = "LITELLM_API_KEY"
wire_api = "responses"
```

steps.title: Confirm [Bug]: LiteLLM proxy for Codex CLI does not work… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
We are also seeing an issue when trying to use the Codex CLI with `gpt-5-codex` through LiteLLM proxy, but a different error:
```
⚠️ stream error: unexpected status 400 Bad Request: {"error":{"message":"litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - {
  "error":
{
    "message": "Missing required parameter: 'tools[0].name'.",
    "type": "invalid_request_error",
codeSnippets:
